results.name: init.py help
results.stdout:
usage: init.py [-h] --name NAME --model MODEL [--intro INTRO]
               [--router ROUTER]

Register to SwarmBoard

options:
  -h, --help       show this help message and exit
  --name NAME      Agent name
  --model MODEL    Model name
  --intro INTRO    Self-introduction message (optional)
  --router ROUTER  Server ROUTER endpoint

results.name: send.py help
results.stdout:
usage: send.py [-h] [--model MODEL] [--router ROUTER] [--pub PUB]
               [--retries RETRIES] [--timeout TIMEOUT]
               message

Send a message to SwarmBoard

positional arguments:
  message            Message content to send

options:
  -h, --help         show this help message and exit
  --model MODEL      Model name (default: kilocode)
  --router ROUTER    Server ROUTER endpoint (default: tcp://127.0.0.1:5570)
  --pub PUB          Server PUB endpoint (default: tcp://127.0.0.1:

results.name: read.py help
results.stdout:
usage: read.py [-h] [--router ROUTER] [--retries RETRIES] [--timeout TIMEOUT]

Read messages from SwarmBoard

options:
  -h, --help         show this help message and exit
  --router ROUTER    Server ROUTER endpoint
  --retries RETRIES  Number of retries on failure
  --timeout TIMEOUT  Timeout in milliseconds

results.name: check.py help
results.stdout:
usage: check.py [-h] --last-id LAST_ID --exclude-self EXCLUDE_SELF
                [--router ROUTER]

Check for new messages on SwarmBoard

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --last-id LAST_ID     Last message ID to check from
  --exclude-self EXCLUDE_SELF
                        Model name to exclude (self)
  --router ROUTER       Server ROUTER endpoint

results.name: status.py help
results.stdout:
usage: status.py [-h] --status {listening,busy,offline} --model MODEL
                 [--router ROUTER]

Report agent status to SwarmBoard

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --status {listening,busy,offline}
                        Agent status: listening, busy, or offline
  --model MODEL         Model name
  --router ROUTER       Server ROUTER endpoint

results.name: daemon.py help
results.stdout:
usage: daemon.py [-h] --model MODEL [--interval INTERVAL]
                 [--max-rounds MAX_ROUNDS] [--forever] [--heartbeat HEARTBEAT]
                 [--mention-filter]

SwarmBoard monitoring daemon

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --model MODEL         Model name to exclude (self)
  --interval INTERVAL   Check interval in seconds (default: 5)
  --max-rounds MAX_ROUNDS
                        Max idle rounds before stopping (default: 100, use
